---
# Geofence-anonymized exhibit. Sensorvault Step 1 production: per-
# device location points returned by Google in response to the
# geofence warrant. Each row is one location point with anonymized
# device ID, timestamp, lat/long, source, and Maps Display Radius.
#
# Render with:  quarto render exhibit-geofence-anonymized.qmd

format: warrant-vignette-typst
document-types:
  - attachment
  - exhibit

# ---- Header consistency ----
state: "Indiana"
county: "Pawnee County"
city: "Pawnee"
detective-name: "Detective B. Macklin"
case-number: "CR24-087"

# ---- Exhibit content ----
exhibit-description: |
  Attached is the Step 1 anonymized location production from
  Google LLC pursuant to the geofence search warrant. Each record
  is a location point reported by a device inside the geographical
  area during the requested time window.

exhibit-type: geofence-anonymized
exhibit-title: "Google LLC -- Geofence Production"
geofence-step: 1
geofence-window-start: "2024-04-22 16:20 EST"
geofence-window-end:   "2024-04-22 17:20 EST"

# Records live in a separate YAML data file because Pandoc's typst
# metadata writer drops the dict contents for this record schema.
# Typst loads them directly via yaml() inside the dispatcher.
exhibit-records-file: "data/exhibit-geofence-anonymized-records.yaml"
---
